name: Service Install and Changes
description: Detects service installation, start-type changes, crashes, and state transitions. Services are a primary persistence mechanism. Event 4697 (Security log) and 7045 (System log) both capture new service installation — check ImagePath for suspicious executables or command lines.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4697: Service installed — ServiceName, ServiceFileName (full path/command), ServiceType, ServiceStartType, ServiceAccount
event_descriptions.7026: Boot-start or system-start driver did not load
event_descriptions.7032: Service Control Manager tried to restart the service after unexpected termination
event_descriptions.7035: Service Control request sent — Start or Stop
event_descriptions.7036: Service entered running or stopped state
event_descriptions.7040: Start type of a service changed (e.g., manual → auto — persistence indicator)
event_descriptions.7045: New service installed — ServiceName, ImagePath, ServiceType, StartType, ServiceAccount
